allow: Bash(perl -i -pe 's|<Link key=\\{e\\.id\\} to="/app/student/take/\\$examId" params=\\{\\{ examId: e\\.id \\}\\}>|<Link key={e.id} to="/app/student/take/\\$examId" params={{ examId: e.id }} className="block">|g; s|<Link key=\\{p\\.id\\} to="/app/student/projects">|<Link key={p.id} to="/app/student/projects" className="block">|g; s|<Link to="/app/admin/users">|<Link to="/app/admin/users" className="block">|g; s|<Link to="/app/teacher/projects">|<Link to="/app/teacher/projects" className="block">|g; s|<Link to="/app/teacher/exams">|<Link to="/app/teacher/exams" className="block">|g; s|<Link to="/app/teacher/workshops">|<Link to="/app/teacher/workshops" className="block">|g; s|<Link to="/app/student/exams">|<Link to="/app/student/exams" className="block">|g; s|<Link to="/app/student/workshops">|<Link to="/app/student/workshops" className="block">|g; s|<Link to="/app/student/projects">|<Link to="/app/student/projects" className="block">|g;' src/routes/app.index.tsx)
PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | Out-String; $out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "CutsEditor" } | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath tsc-out.tmp; Get-Content tsc-out.tmp | Where-Object { $_ -match "CutsEditor" } | Select-Object -First 10; Remove-Item tsc-out.tmp)

Bash(cd d:/Projects/Personal/examlab && grep -nE "^\\s*//.*\(se removi|se quit|removimos|quitamos|antes había|antes era|antes ten|antes vivía\)" src/routes/app.teacher.monitor.\\$examId.tsx src/shared/components/AppLayout.tsx src/routes/app.teacher.gradebook.tsx 2>&1 | head -30)
